name: busy_day
description: A busy news day: multiple cross-source stories including a genuine BREAKTHROUGH (DeepSeek V4) mentioned by HN + arXiv + a blog (tests dedup/cluster collapse + tier=breakthrough), plus several NOTABLE/MINOR items across academia/industry/community.

items.title: DeepSeek V4 released: a new RL post-training recipe resets the frontier
items.author: dang
items.raw_text: DeepSeek V4 ships a new reinforcement-learning post-training recipe that beats prior open models on reasoning benchmarks. Multi-agent self-play during RL. Weights are open. This is a large language model and foundation model breakthrough with optimization implications.

items.title: DeepSeek V4: Reinforcement Learning Post-Training at Scale
items.author: DeepSeek AI
items.raw_text: We present DeepSeek V4, a large language model trained with a new RL post-training recipe combining multi-agent self-play and an optimized advantage estimator. State-of-the-art on reasoning. Accepted-style writeup; targets NeurIPS. Efficient and scalable NLP techniques throughout.

items.title: AINews: DeepSeek V4 is the big one today
items.author: swyx
items.raw_text: The big one today: DeepSeek V4. A new RL post-training recipe. Open weights. Everyone is talking about the multi-agent self-play and the foundation model scaling.

items.title: Linear Attention Variants for Long-Context Efficient NLP
items.author: A. Researcher
items.raw_text: A new linear-attention variant improves throughput for long context. Efficient and scalable NLP. Modest gains, careful ablations. ACL-style.

items.title: New multi-agent orchestration framework hits 1.0
items.author: u/agentbuilder
items.raw_text: A multi-agent systems framework reached 1.0 with a tool-routing planner. Useful but incremental. Multi-agent systems tooling.

items.title: Optimization tricks for cheaper RLHF
items.author: HF Community
items.raw_text: Optimization tricks reduce the cost of RLHF for NLP. Reinforcement learning for NLP. Practical, not groundbreaking.

items.title: A minor SDK point release
items.author: Anthropic
items.raw_text: A small SDK point release with bug fixes. Nothing major.
